risk_title: Political and Governance Constraints on Project Authority Functions
risk_summary: The general director of FGPE cannot execute official documents without 'agrément' (approval) from BCRG (central bank), creating a governance bottleneck that impedes project implementation and decision-making authority.
evidence_quote: the general director does not still have have the "agrément" from BCRG, and without such agrément he cannot sign official documents

risk_title: Government Agency Pause on Critical Infrastructure Due to Site Concerns
risk_summary: The Ministry of Agriculture (MAGEL) has paused construction of the food safety laboratory and requested Bank reassessment of the selected site, citing concerns about functionality. This suggests potential governance or political sensitivities around infrastructure placement that could delay or derail implementation.
evidence_quote: the MAGEL decided to pause this activity and solicit the assistance of the Bank for a reassessment of the site selected. The MAGEL is concerned that an alternative may be required to ensure full functionality of the laboratory

risk_title: Delays in UN Agency Implementation of Value Chain Activities
risk_summary: Implementation of activities by United Nations Agencies (PAM and FAO) supporting rice, fruit, and livestock value chains is delayed, particularly those attributed to FAO. This suggests potential coordination or governance friction between international partners and government counterparts.
evidence_quote: The execution of the activities by the United Nations Agencies (PAM et FAO) to support the rice, fruit and livestock value chains is delayed, particularly those attributed to FAO
